Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: NZ contracts: costs presented as 'excluding GST'. Overseas contracts: costs 'excluding any applicable taxes and duties, payable by the Client on any taxable supplies'. | Escalation: Tax and Compliance team (where offshore Client requires UoA to incorporate offshore tax).

flags.snippet: 2.2 The CONTRACTOR shall issue an invoice to [redacted] for payments due and shall include a breakdown of costs and Disbursements (copies of receipts for Disbursements will be made available to [redacted] on request). W…
flags.rationale: Aligns with UoA preferred position on Payment Terms — matches "20th of the month". Preferred: 20th of the month following date of invoice.

flags.clause_title: 3 CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION
flags.snippet: 3 CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Confidentiality; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Definition of confidential information excludes information already public, independently developed, previously known by receiving party, and information legally required to be disclosed. UoA must be able to disclose to agents and Affiliates. Duration up to 5 years post-completion of confidentiality period. | Acceptable: Confidentiality obligations limited in time (e.g. 5–7 years post-termination/expiry/disclosure). | Escalation: Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts.

flags.clause_title: 5 LIABILITY AND INSURANCE
flags.snippet: 5 LIABILITY AND INSURANCE
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Liability Limitations and Exclusions; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Total liability (including under indemnities offered) limited to the lesser of: (a) amount paid under the contract / contract value (subject to liability limit in Research Contract Delegations) OR (b) NZD$500,000. Limited to direct losses caused by negligent acts/omissions or wilful misconduct of the University. Consequential or indirect losses, 'hold harmless', and loss of data/profit/revenue/savings/business/goodwill explicitly excluded. | Acceptable: Total liability limit (including indemnities) in line with Research Contract Delegations. Uncapped liability acceptable ONLY for Trusted Funders on contestable rounds. Indirect losses acceptable only if total exposure is capped per Delegations. Carve-outs from cap acceptable for: Fraud, Wilful default, Personal injury/death, statutory non-excludable liability, and confidentiality (only if client revenue < NZD$150M). | Escalation: Refer Research Grants and Contracts Delegations (and Portfolio Manager for Trusted Funders on non-contestable rounds).

flags.clause_title: 5.1 The CONTRACTOR indemnifies [redacted] and will keep [redacted] indemnified
flags.snippet: 5.1 The CONTRACTOR indemnifies [redacted] and will keep [redacted] indemnified against any loss, damage or expenses (including legal costs and any taxes, levies, withholdings and deductions due from any payment to the C…
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: 5.2 Where the Specific Terms contain insurance details, the CONTRACTOR shall
flags.snippet: 5.2 Where the Specific Terms contain insurance details, the CONTRACTOR shall maintain the insurance set out in the Specific Terms, for no lesser amount than that specified and for a term expiring no earlier than six yea…
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Foreign Currency; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Payment made in NZD. | Acceptable: Foreign currencies under NZD$500,000 from countries with FX rates listed by FIRST. | Escalation: UoA Treasury via FIRST (for foreign currencies > NZD$500,000 or unlisted FX rates).

flags.clause_title: 8. SUSPENSION OR TERMINATION
flags.snippet: 8. SUSPENSION OR TERMINATION
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Termination; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Mutual two-way termination for material breach of contract or insolvency. Clear right of UoA to terminate for client's failure to pay. Accrued rights and benefits not affected. Client pays termination costs including any uncancellable obligations. | Acceptable: Termination for convenience acceptable ONLY for Consulting contracts, with reasonable notice, PI agreement, and client paying termination costs / uncancellable obligations. Cannot always alter termination provisions for NZ and International Funding Agency contracts (escalate to PM). | Escalation: Senior Manager Research Grants and Contracts.

flags.clause_title: 9. DISPUTE RESOLUTION
flags.snippet: 9. DISPUTE RESOLUTION
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Dispute Resolution; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Both parties must discuss in good faith before arbitration or litigation. Escalation to senior management followed by mediation before arbitration/litigation. All proceedings in English. Process must not prevent urgent interlocutory action through courts. | Acceptable: Cannot always alter dispute clauses for NZ and International Funding Agency contracts — escalation not required where this is the case. | Escalation: Senior Manager Research Grants and Contracts / General Counsel (or Designated Legal Advisor in absence).
